title: Transformative AI in Critical Infrastructures: Safe, Secure and Governable Systems
description_es: Este trabajo examina los requisitos de seguridad y gobernanza para el despliegue de sistemas de IA transformadora en infraestructuras críticas.
abstract: Transformative AI systems deployed in critical infrastructures require rigorous safety, security, and governance frameworks. This paper identifies key challenges and proposes architectural requirements for deploying AI systems in safety-critical domains such as energy, transportation, and healthcare infrastructure.

citations.apa: Mentxaka, O., Nuñez, E., Gomez, E., & Herrera, F. (2026). Transformative AI in Critical Infrastructures: Safe, Secure and Governable Systems. (Under Review).
citations.mla: Mentxaka, Oier, E. Nuñez, E. Gomez, and Francisco Herrera. "Transformative AI in Critical Infrastructures: Safe, Secure and Governable Systems." (Under Review), 2026.
